content_body: Every evening at dusk the concert started: the trout lumbering upstream, the babbling stream, black bears baying in the distance, the rain hitting the leaves... The kids all said, "Let's buy some of these cabins and rent them out", to which I replied, "NEVER start a business when someone else is already doing it better"! Pam is still impressed with the appointments of the cabin - granite, stainless steel appliances...This was just a fabulous vacation. Thank you for providing such an amazing place for people to reconnect with nature.
title: Reconnecting With Nature In The North Georgia Mountains
